# ToolResultContent.ToolUseId property

REQUIRED. The [`Id`](../ToolUseContent/Id.md) of the tool use this result corresponds to; it MUST match the `id` from a previous [`ToolUseContent`](../ToolUseContent.md) (spec §21.2.6).
